programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 423
programme.desc: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark helps Leonard with his magic wand issues, and Twayne Boneraper meets his two-dimensional soulmate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After winning a contest for Gritty Kitty Litter.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie goes baby-crazy when Mark fosters a demon orphan, and Twayne notices odd changes in his body.

programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 20

programme.desc: Tonight the competitors are divided into red & blue teams, led by Gary and George. They head to the supermarket to choose ingredients for a 3-course meal, but the catch is: each team is only allowed to shop from 3 randomly assigned supermarket aisles

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 22

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tonight's Mystery Box tests the contender's seafood skills. They've got just half an hour to create their dish using a whole snapper, chilli, eggs & beer. Chris decides his best bet is to drink the beer, while Tom tests his skills with an Asian dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Each of the bottom three from last night's challenge must cook sticky date pudding with butterscotch sauce. It's a restaurant favourite, but given its simplicity, the judges will notice even the tiniest flaw. Who will be judged the weakest?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge, the contestant must produce a better gnocchi than Alex Herbert, from the famed Bird Cow Fish restaurant in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 27

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Team elimination is the toughest night of the week for competitors in the losing team. They must decide which of their team mates deserves to be sent home. Friendships are tested and emotions stretched, never more so than tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: The contestants get their weekly fix of cooking class from Gary and George. On the menu this time, how to cook snapper using a paper bag, and the perfect steak.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box contestants must create their own designer cupcakes, and the designs are indeed unique as Chris decides beer is the magic secret ingredient that will get him over the line.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 31

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 32

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701

programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: David Kim, CEO of Baja Fresh, one of the nation's largest restaurant chains, takes matters into his own hands when he encounters a problem at one of his stores. And after his emotional undercover mission, delivers some shocking news to his boardroom.

programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Elephant Song
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is drawn into an intricate mind game with a disturbed patient when a colleague goes missing.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: After learning that his wife has been killed in Iraq, a man takes his two daughters on a roadtrip to Florida.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A biography of sports legend Muhammad Ali, focusing on his triumphs and controversies between 1964 and 1974.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: When his brother goes missing, Tommy, the family's black-sheep, cares for his sister-in-law and nieces.

programme.title: The Dresser
programme.desc: Sir reflects on his accomplishments and seeks to reconcile his turbulent friendships with those in his employ.

programme.title: The Ballad of Jack & Rose
programme.desc: A single father tries to come to terms with his 16-year-old daughter Rose's coming-of-age.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Milli is visiting her friend Emily's class for Favourite Things Day, the day everyone brings in their favourite things to show the whole class. Emily has some sparkly shells.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When the girls bake a cake with bouncing flour, it bounces off and they must catch it in time for Roya's Feather Day party! A potion spill turns Rocket's barks magical. But when the magic gets out of control, the kids must find a way to stop it.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta and Zac get trapped inside a magic bottle and must find a way out before all their friends get sucked inside too! Zeta tries to stop the kids from finding her secret lair when she sees them hunting for gems in the area.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Dora and Boots hop on Pegaso, the flying horse constellation, for a high-flying adventure to bring home his constellation friends to the Moon before the Sun rises!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Baby Bongo on a musical adventure as they race to the Big Music Show in time for Baby Bongo's first performance.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby join Pegwheel the Pirate-Truck for an island treasure hunt! Following their treasure map, the friends search jungle beaches and mountains to find where X marks the spot.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dora's Royal Rescue: Dora and Boots and the noble horse, Rocinante, are off to Story Castle to rescue Don Quixote from the evil wizard, Malambruno.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The girls are in for some fun and adventure when a pirate genie accidentally lands on their doorstep.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze, Stripes, and AJ are racing through the jungle when Stripes discovers a lost little fire beetle named Sparky. Blaze and his friends set off across the jungle to help Sparky get back home to the top of a red hot volcano.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 619
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights when suddenly they hear a cry for help. It's a princess who's calling us from the Royal Garden! It turns out that it's not the princess that needs saving – her kitty's stuck in a tree!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Zeta steals Samira's necklace, they must get it back before she figures out its special power./ When Zeta steals Samira's staff and turns everyone into chickens, Shimmer, Shine, and Leah must stop her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls visit the carpet vendor to fix their carpet, while Zeta and Nazboo plan to take some magic thread. / Zeta and Nazboo tell the girls the fun story of how they first met, but their facts don't quite match up.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nazboo gets sick with Dragon Pox, and Leah, Shimmer, and Shine go on an adventure to find the magical cure. The girls meet a Lightning Genie and help him catch his runaway lightning bolt before it causes any trouble.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Nila, the mermaid, has always wanted to see Zahramay Falls, so the girls take her on a magical tour above water. When the girls help the Dream Genie's apprentice deliver dreams, they accidentally swap Zeta's and Nazboo's.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When costumes get magically stuck on Shimmer, Shine and Leah, they must track down a special feather to undo the magic. Zeta impersonates the girls' potions teacher and tricks them into helping her brew a sneaky potion.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket! Now it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue the two trucks before their runaway rocket crashes into the garbage dump.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are practicing for the big skateboard competition when Leah's skateboard breaks. When Leah asks her favorite genies for a new board, Shimmer and Shine accidentally give her the wrong kind of board: a surfboard!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Team Truck Challenge, a race where all the trucks get to compete in teams of two! But when Crusher chooses a new partner instead of Pickle, his disappointed sidekick teams up with Blaze to prove his mettle.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Leah wins a genie bottle pendant at a carnival and is surprised to find that her prize comes with a bonus – genies Shimmer and Shine. Parte 2.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Olly realizes he forgot to put stamps on a package he sent to his Grandma. Team Umizoomi zooms to the post office to find the package, and work out just how many stamps it needs.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Dragon Island Duel, a race around tropical Dragon Island! But when Crusher cheats and sends Blaze away before the race, AJ must set out to rescue his best friend and bring him back to the starting line.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become book explorers and enter the worlds of Peter Pan, the Wizard of Oz, and Little Red Riding Hood so they can find missing objects for the library's Story Wall.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls befriend a cute creature, only to find out that their magic doesn't work when it's nearby. / Zeta's relaxing night at the treehouse is halted when the girls also show up, so she tries to scare them away.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: The Grumpy Old Troll's getting married to Petunia and we all get to be a part of this wedding! Everything's almost ready, except the Grumpy Old Troll forgot to pick up the rings from his Grandma's House! Will we make it in time for the wedding?!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 102

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm in 'Pineapple Fever', and then in 'Chum Caverns', Plankton creates an underground restaurant that rivals the Krusty Krab!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 126

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to find enough food to feed Pearl as she goes through her growth spurt and later, after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Later, SpongeBob and Patrick watch their heroes fight bad guys in a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer break at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 14

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 15

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 16

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery on a runaway train.

programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are accidentally locked in Bikini Bottom's first time capsule. SpongeBob and Patrick build a dream world for Squidward.

programme.desc: Dag attempts to make Norb's dreams come true when Norb confesses his silly dream to become a Liepezoner Stallion.

programme.desc: One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine: After Timmy’s rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music./Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident and suddenly she is stricken by his generosity.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Arnold and Gerald both get jobs working for Mrs. Vitello in her flower shop. /Arnold designs a fantastic float for the City Day Parade, but the school has no money to build it.

programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Love at First Bark/Desperate Without Housewives: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg’s new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky. When Mom won’t stop nagging Timmy and Dad, Timmy wishes all women away for one day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dog Gone/Turner Back Time: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad’s life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan. Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy’s family becomes rich and spoiled.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts! Timmy makes magic You Doo dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Knitwits/Dimmsdale’s Got Talent?: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it’s really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Invasion of the Dads: Timmy’s previous wish for a Planet of Dads backfires when the Dads realize the one thing missing from their lives is Mom, and they come to steal her away from Dad and Timmy!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dadbracadbra/Timmy Turnip: With a little help from Timmy, Dad’s magic tricks really work. Convinced that Timmy’s dad is a fairy, Crocker is out to prove it and uncover his secret on national television.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Mud Bowl/Gerald Moves Out: Arnold and the rest of his fourth grade friends play the seemingly unbeatable fifth graders in touch football. In the end, the fourth grade smarts win over the brute strength of the fifth graders.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 45
programme.desc: While feeling the effects of laughing gas, Helga leaves a confessional message of love on Arnold's phone machine. / After Harold shoplifts some meat from the butcher shop, he is sentenced to work off his punishment.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Confident and secure, Timmy feels great having won the battle against The Darkness. His world is quickly turned upside down as he learns that he didn’t win, but is now living inside The Darkness!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A Sash and a Rash/Fish Out of Water: Chloe thinks she has a stress-caused rash and wishes to be a slacker, but Dimmsdale falls apart without her. Dad wants to catch a giant fish to win a trophy, but Chloe wishes all the fish could fight back.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 66
